name: Alpha Girls
overview: When their father, Alpha, calls them home to Indonesia, Sierra, and Ivy, two sisters from different mothers, realize who can revive the declining Alpha company and will replace him as leader. Something that not only Sierra and Ivy wanted, but also their respective mothers, who were Alpha's first and second wives, two ambitious women who could never get along, who also raised their respective two ambitious girls. The battle is about to start!

trailers.title: Alpha Girls | Trailer | Tissa Biani, Jihane Almira, Antonio Blanco Jr, Kevin Julio
